# USMLE Reasoning Lab

> Public companion site for original USMLE teaching videos, with reviewed transcripts, quick answers, Q&A, and sources.

Site: https://wenchangyue.github.io/usmle-reasoning-lab/
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@USMLEReasoningLab
Author: Wenchang Yue, MD, PhD
Language: English
Updated: 2026-07-13

## Public pages

- [Companion site home](https://wenchangyue.github.io/usmle-reasoning-lab/)
- [USMLE best-next-step reasoning](https://wenchangyue.github.io/usmle-reasoning-lab/ep/exam-strategy-principles/)
- [Anterior mediastinal mass and tumor markers](https://wenchangyue.github.io/usmle-reasoning-lab/ep/anterior-mediastinal-germ-cell/)
- [D- vs L-glucose transport mechanism](https://wenchangyue.github.io/usmle-reasoning-lab/ep/glucose-transport-mechanism/)
- [Hereditary fructose intolerance and aldolase B](https://wenchangyue.github.io/usmle-reasoning-lab/ep/hereditary-fructose-intolerance/)

Episode pages are published only after the matching YouTube video is public and the source, rights, medical-QA, and caption checks pass. No commercial question-bank or recall content is reproduced.

## Use

- This material is for exam preparation and general medical education.
- It is not medical advice, a diagnosis, or a substitute for care from a licensed clinician.
